label: Transparent Birds Nest Fungus motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a birds nest fungus cluster for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate birds nest fungus (Nidulariaceae) fruiting bodies from a woodchip bed: small brown nest-like cups with fibrous ridged outer walls, darker cocoa interiors, and several smooth silver-gray egg-like peridioles inside each cup. Include a small natural cluster with varied cup sizes and crisp silhouettes.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the cups and egg-like peridioles clearly without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves brown cup texture, silver egg highlights, mulch-derived warm neutrals, and miniature scale detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Style/medium: naturalistic macro botanical/fungal specimen, polished catalog cutout, high detail.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no labels, no insects, no leaves as main subject, no landscape, no soil scene, no second unrelated species, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Birds Nest Fungus" / "Birds Nest Fungus", a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme derived only from birds nest fungus in a woodchip bed.
Reference use: Use the birds nest fungus motif shown in context: brown nest cups, fibrous ribbed cup walls, dark cocoa interiors, smooth silver egg-like peridioles, tan mulch fibers, umber shadow, warm cream spore dust. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from those colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide; clean precise grid, large readable labels, not cramped.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Geist or Inter-like sans; Japanese UI guidance with Noto Sans JP-like examples. Short readable labels only.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn samples including primary/secondary/outline/ghost buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, pagination, toast/status, empty/loading/error states.
Navigation and data domain: labels must reference woodchip beds, mulch clusters, fungus cups, peridiole counts, garden bed surveys, compost path samples, and specimen records.
Visual language: miniature component system; exactly 8px radii; cup-nest cards, silver egg-dot indicators, mulch-fiber separators, silver focus rings, brown/tan surfaces, cocoa text, tiny data capsules inspired by peridioles.
Text: include these exact clear labels where useful: Birds Nest Fungus, Woodchip Bed, Peridiole Count, Cup Clusters, Garden Beds, Specimens, Survey, Ready, Active, Warning, Error, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadows.
Avoid: the words Waxcap, mushroom, meadow, grassland, wet meadow, heath, mire, woodland edge, flower, insect, unrelated species, unrelated bright colors, purple or blue gradients, generic stock UI kit, random brand names, misspelled title, watermark, tiny unreadable token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Birds Nest Fungus" / "Birds Nest Fungus". It must feel like the same system as the light board shown in context, translated to dark mode, not a different theme.
Reference use: Use the birds nest fungus motif and the light design-system board shown in context. Preserve the motif-derived palette roles: brown cup walls, fibrous tan mulch, dark cocoa interiors, umber shadows, silver egg-like peridioles, pearl gray, warm cream spore highlights, and muted moss/olive status only if needed.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide; clean precise grid, large readable labels, not cramped.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode label, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Geist or Inter-like sans; Japanese UI guidance with Noto Sans JP-like examples. Short readable labels only.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn dark UI samples including primary/secondary/outline/ghost buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, pagination, toast/status, empty/loading/error states.
Navigation and data domain: labels must reference woodchip beds, mulch clusters, fungus cups, peridiole counts, garden bed surveys, compost path samples, and specimen records.
Visual language: miniature component system; exactly 8px radii; dark cocoa background, nest-brown cards, tan mulch borders, silver peridiole focus rings, warm cream foreground, cup-nest panels, silver egg-dot indicators, mulch-fiber separators.
Text: include these exact clear labels where useful: Birds Nest Fungus, Dark Mode, Woodchip Bed, Peridiole Count, Cup Clusters, Garden Beds, Specimens, Survey, Ready, Active, Warning, Error, Radius 8px, Spacing, Shadows.
Avoid: the words Waxcap, mushroom, meadow, grassland, wet meadow, heath, mire, woodland edge, flower, insect, unrelated species, neon colors, pure black flat background, purple or blue gradients, generic stock UI kit, random brand names, misspelled title, watermark, tiny unreadable token tables.
